sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UInt32, uuid String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, UUIDStringToNum(uuid) AS uuid_bytes FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, multiIf(uuid IS NULL, 'NULL UUID', uuid, UUIDStringToNum(uuid)) AS processed_uuid FROM test_uuids;
SELECT id, uuid, UUIDStringToNum(uuid) AS bytes FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid LIKE '612%' OR id = 1;
CREATE TABLE uuid_metrics (id UInt32, bytes FixedString(16)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO uuid_metrics SELECT id, UUIDStringToNum(uuid) FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bytes FROM uuid_metrics WHERE NOT bytes = UUIDStringToNum('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000');
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM uuid_metrics GROUP BY bytes HAVING count > 1;
WITH (SELECT MIN(UUIDStringToNum(uuid)) FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL) AS min_uuid_bytes SELECT id, uuid, UUIDStringToNum(uuid), min_uuid_bytes FROM test_uuids ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, UUIDStringToNum(uuid, 2) AS microsoft_bytes FROM test_uuids WHERE bytes IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, multiIf(length(uuid) = 36, UUIDStringToNum(uuid), NULL) AS potentially_valid_uuid FROM test_uuids;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_uuid_test AS SELECT id, uuid FROM test_uuids;
SELECT id, IF(bytes IS NULL, 'No Bytes', bytes) FROM (SELECT id, UUIDStringToNum(uuid) AS bytes FROM temp_uuid_test WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL) AS sub;
ALTER TABLE temp_uuid_test ADD COLUMN description String;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_uuid_test WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL) AS valid_count SELECT valid_count, COUNT(*) FROM temp_uuid_test GROUP BY uuid HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
